title: National Digital Economy Strategy
summary: Supports public and private digital transformation and is relevant to smart systems where it frames Bahrain’s development of digital infrastructure, emerging technology adoption, data-driven services, and digital economy capabilities.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.autonomous_smart_system: Current national strategy for Bahrain’s digital economy.

notes: Related instruments: Digital Government Strategy 2022 and General Policy for the Use of Artificial Intelligence
